TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Kawakawasan ratoh no 'Amis/Pangcah == "Milikatay wawa to fafahiya"-Tiyamacan ato "Wawa no riyar kawas" -Felalakac.("發光的女孩"Tiyamacan與"海神之子"Felalakac) Ci Tiyamacan, o cecay fafahiya kawas no 'Amis/Pangcah, nawhani o makapahay fafahiyan kaolahen no wawa no riyar ci Falalakac nicefisan malafafahi, orasaka mala o tato'asan to no laloma'an no 'Amis/Pangcah. Ci Tiyamacan o sasafaay wawa to fafahiyan no tasaay kawas ci Madapidap ato ci Keseng. Matira ko soal o samakapahay nengnengen cingra, nikaitiyad ho no ina caay ho kahofaoc i malikat ci'edil saan, citiyad ho ci Madapidap malikat ko 'edil, ikor no kahofoc malokaolahan no laloma'an kaomi'en. Kawakawasan ratoh no 'Amis/Pangcah. Ira ko cecay romi'ad, tayra i 'alo ci Tiyamacan miradom i, manengneng no wawa no riyar kawas ci Felalakac, kaimahen ni Felalakac kokakapah ningra, nanoya ngitangicen ni Felalakac a malafafahi, o laloma'an ni Tiyamac caay ka sakaala ni Felalakac, tafone to papah no kilang a misimed, palimeken to i laloma' kongkong no kilang ano eca i tatahengan misimed, nikawrira nika milikatay matedi ko tireng ni Tiyamacan mahapineng manengneng, marketer to ci Felalakac pacefcef han to ningra ko riyar i hekal, masanga' to ko lenlen maalol tayra i riyar ci Tiyamacan, itiya patanic han malafafahi. Mapawpaw ci Tiyamacan i riyar, o mama ato ina ningra itira i salawacan no riyar mikotod pasariyar tangasa i kawali ka'amis no Takidis, mafana' o caacaay to pakaliyas ci Felalakasan sato, itiya laliyas sato mama ato ina, nanoya ci Madapidap ato ci Keseng o ka'ilolan to wawa ci Tiyamacan, mala o Dakidakit ato Arongay misimaw i salawacan no riyar. Katengilan no sowal, mapaci'eci kalofafahien ci Tiyamacan i, makakeleng ko kakarayan, o todong pitifekan ningra to felac; ano ci langod ko riyar i, o pifalahan ningra to 'asad ato afih, oy ana 'asad ato afih malapodaw, o kadademakan no kidacay foting i riyar, o todong piwangawang ningra to kamay. "Milikatay wawa to fafahiya"- no satapangan to'asan Kawakawasan ratoh no 'Amis/Pangcah. Iti:ya ho, ina no kawas ci Madapidap ato mama no kawas ci Keseng a tasaay fa'elohay kawas, malikelon cangra itira 'akawangay katimolay kitakit a Arapanapanayan lotok, misofoc to fainayan kawas ci Ladi'afo, Dadakiyolo, Apotok, Lalakan, fafahiyan kawas ci Doc, Tiyamacan a 'enem wawa a kawas. Nikawrira ya cipoyapoy ko ina a kawas ci Tiyamacan i, ira ko malikatay i tiyad, mahapinang manengneng ko laloma'ay, masofoc mahapinang o makapahay nengnengen o fafahiya wawa a kawas. Ira ko cecay romi'ad, o safa fafahiyan masadak a miladom, i fatad no lalan malitemoh ko wawa no riyar kawas ci Felalakacan, nanoya maolah patangic a malofafahien, nanoya paro no loma' misakimokimor misimed milaliw. Nikawrira manengneng caay pakasimed, marketer a palalenlen to sapicefis to sasafaay a safa to fafahiyan milaliw. O ka'ilol no ina ci Madapidap to sasafaay wawa to fafahiyan, mala molengaway i tonotono'an a Dakidakit, o mama ci Keseng mala Arongay misimaw to salawacan no riyar; o sakakaay ci Tadi'Afo milimek tayra i lotok, ikor mala tato'asan no Atayal finacadan; saka tosa a kaka ci Dadakiyolo milaliw pasi'etip mala o tato'asan no 'etipay yincumin; saka tolo a wawa ci Apotok milaliw pasitimol mala tato'asan no Iwatan(Ponon) finacadan; saka sepat a safa ci Lalakan ato saka lima safa to fafahiyan ci Doci i ta'akay riyar, midakaw to toptop mapawpaw i lenlen, nikawrira caay pakatama to hakal, caay pakatama to loma', matatangic a tatosa. Talifahal sa ira ko 'arikak, oni ta'ian nira masataporoay masadak i riyar, o nian koya ikoray a Cilangasan. Mata'elif ko romi'ami'ad, mato'as to cangra tatosa, caay pakatama to roma maloramod, nanoyaan o nia malikakaay raramod sato cangra. Sa'ayaw o nisofocan nangra tatosa o kalingsesan pina'orip, tinako o Kangic, Tatakaay, Fafirung, Harokay. Tatodong sa pasilaeno ko nengneng no Cidal kawas, miocor to saka falo a wawa a kawas ci Tatakusan a minengneng, talifahal sa pakanengneng cangra tatosa to nai kakarayan kawas malokelon, nawhani metalaw sapilaliwan a mitefoc, fo'otan no kawas a miliclic to kamatira no demak. Itiya mafana' to demakan, songila' han to ni Tatakusan pasifana' ko ina no kawas, sasini'ada sa ko Cdal, ocoren ho ko wawa kawas malikelon mihinom tina malikakaay, mihayda miocor to midipotay kawas a malikelon. Sanoyaan ci Salalacal ato Saoriyan a kawas mihawikid to cecay aol tayni hekal pasifana' samaanen ko kadadi'i i naikoran a mafadocay no lenlen a malikakaay, itiya manga'ay ko kaciwawa. Pasifana' han to ni Tatakusan: "Nawhani o malikakaay kamo tatosa, caay kanga'ay mararamod, orasaka kelongen ko sikal, palaed tamonan tatosa, haenen ta manga'ay madadi'i ko kaciwawa namo." Nanoyaan ikor ciwawa cangra malikaka to toloay wawa to fafahiya ato cecay fainayan, o nian ko tato'asan no tamdamdaw. No kawas a rayray.
S.PHON: == kawakawasan rato~uħ no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ == "miɾikataj wawa to~u fafaħija"-tijamaʦan ato~u "wawa no~u rijar kawas" -fəɾaɾakaʦ.("*****"tijamaʦan*"****"fəɾaɾakaʦ) ʦi tijamaʦan, o~u ʦəʦaj fafaħija kawas no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ, nawħani o~u makapaħaj fafaħijan kao~uɾaħən no~u wawa no~u rijar ʦi faɾaɾakaʦ niʦəfisan maɾafafaħi, o~urasaka maɾa o~u tato~uʡasan to~u no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ. ʦi tijamaʦan o~u sasafaaj wawa to~u fafaħijan no~u tasaaj kawas ʦi maɬ~ɮapiɬ~ɮap ato~u ʦi kəsəŋ. matira ko~u so~uaɾ o~u samakapaħaj nəŋnəŋən ʦiŋra, nikaitijaɬ~ɮ ħo~u no~u ina ʦaaj ħo~u kaħo~ufao~uʦ i maɾikat ʦiʡəɬ~ɮiɾ saan, ʦitijaɬ~ɮ ħo~u ʦi maɬ~ɮapiɬ~ɮap maɾikat ko~u ʡəɬ~ɮiɾ, iko~ur no~u kaħo~ufo~uʦ maɾo~ukao~uɾaħan no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan kao~umiʡən. kawakawasan rato~uħ no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ. ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajra i ʡaɾo~u ʦi tijamaʦan miraɬ~ɮo~um i, manəŋnəŋ no~u wawa no~u rijar kawas ʦi fəɾaɾakaʦ, kaimaħən ni fəɾaɾakaʦ ko~ukakapaħ niŋra, nano~uja ŋitaŋiʦən ni fəɾaɾakaʦ a maɾafafaħi, o~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ni tijamaʦ ʦaaj ka sakaaɾa ni fəɾaɾakaʦ, tafo~unə to~u papaħ no~u kiɾaŋ a misiməɬ~ɮ, paɾiməkən to~u i ɾaɾo~umaʡ ko~uŋko~uŋ no~u kiɾaŋ ano~u əʦa i tataħəŋan misiməɬ~ɮ, nikawrira nika miɾikataj matəɬ~ɮi ko~u tirəŋ ni tijamaʦan maħapinəŋ manəŋnəŋ, markətər to~u ʦi fəɾaɾakaʦ paʦəfʦəf ħan to~u niŋra ko~u rijar i ħəkaɾ, masaŋaʡ to~u ko~u ɾənɾən maaɾo~uɾ tajra i rijar ʦi tijamaʦan, itija pataniʦ ħan maɾafafaħi. mapawpaw ʦi tijamaʦan i rijar, o~u mama ato~u ina niŋra itira i saɾawaʦan no~u rijar miko~uto~uɬ~ɮ pasarijar taŋasa i kawaɾi kaʡamis no~u takiɬ~ɮis, mafanaʡ o~u ʦaaʦaaj to~u pakaɾijas ʦi fəɾaɾakasan sato~u, itija ɾaɾijas sato~u mama ato~u ina, nano~uja ʦi maɬ~ɮapiɬ~ɮap ato~u ʦi kəsəŋ o~u kaʡiɾo~uɾan to~u wawa ʦi tijamaʦan, maɾa o~u ɬ~ɮakiɬ~ɮakit ato~u aro~uŋaj misimaw i saɾawaʦan no~u rijar. katəŋiɾan no~u so~uwaɾ, mapaʦiʡəʦi kaɾo~ufafaħiən ʦi tijamaʦan i, makakəɾəŋ ko~u kakarajan, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ pitifəkan niŋra to~u fəɾaʦ; ano~u ʦi ɾaŋo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u rijar i, o~u pifaɾaħan niŋra to~u ʡasaɬ~ɮ ato~u afiħ, o~uj ana ʡasaɬ~ɮ ato~u afiħ maɾapo~uɬ~ɮaw, o~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan no~u kiɬ~ɮaʦaj fo~utiŋ i rijar, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ piwaŋawaŋ niŋra to~u kamaj. "miɾikataj wawa to~u fafaħija"- no~u satapaŋan to~uʡasan kawakawasan rato~uħ no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ. iti:ja ħo~u, ina no~u kawas ʦi maɬ~ɮapiɬ~ɮap ato~u mama no~u kawas ʦi kəsəŋ a tasaaj faʡəɾo~uħaj kawas, maɾikəɾo~un ʦaŋra itira ʡakawaŋaj katimo~uɾaj kitakit a arapanapanajan ɾo~uto~uk, miso~ufo~uʦ to~u fainajan kawas ʦi ɾaɬ~ɮiʡafo~u, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮakijo~uɾo~u, apo~uto~uk, ɾaɾakan, fafaħijan kawas ʦi ɬ~ɮo~uʦ, tijamaʦan a ʡənəm wawa a kawas. nikawrira ja ʦipo~ujapo~uj ko~u ina a kawas ʦi tijamaʦan i, ira ko~u maɾikataj i tijaɬ~ɮ, maħapinaŋ manəŋnəŋ ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡaj, maso~ufo~uʦ maħapinaŋ o~u makapaħaj nəŋnəŋən o~u fafaħija wawa a kawas. ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u safa fafaħijan masaɬ~ɮak a miɾaɬ~ɮo~um, i fataɬ~ɮ no~u ɾaɾan maɾitəmo~uħ ko~u wawa no~u rijar kawas ʦi fəɾaɾakaʦan, nano~uja mao~uɾaħ pataŋiʦ a maɾo~ufafaħiən, nano~uja paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ misakimo~ukimo~ur misiməɬ~ɮ miɾaɾiw. nikawrira manəŋnəŋ ʦaaj pakasiməɬ~ɮ, markətər a paɾaɾənɾən to~u sapiʦəfis to~u sasafaaj a safa to~u fafaħijan miɾaɾiw. o~u kaʡiɾo~uɾ no~u ina ʦi maɬ~ɮapiɬ~ɮap to~u sasafaaj wawa to~u fafaħijan, maɾa mo~uɾəŋawaj i to~uno~uto~uno~uʡan a ɬ~ɮakiɬ~ɮakit, o~u mama ʦi kəsəŋ maɾa aro~uŋaj misimaw to~u saɾawaʦan no~u rijar; o~u sakakaaj ʦi taɬ~ɮiʡafo~u miɾimək tajra i ɾo~uto~uk, iko~ur maɾa tato~uʡasan no~u atajaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan; saka to~usa a kaka ʦi ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮakijo~uɾo~u miɾaɾiw pasiʡətip maɾa o~u tato~uʡasan no~u ʡətipaj jinʦo~u~umin; saka to~uɾo~u a wawa ʦi apo~uto~uk miɾaɾiw pasitimo~uɾ maɾa tato~uʡasan no~u iwatan(po~uno~un) finaʦaɬ~ɮan; saka səpat a safa ʦi ɾaɾakan ato~u saka ɾima safa to~u fafaħijan ʦi ɬ~ɮo~uʦi i taʡakaj rijar, miɬ~ɮakaw to~u to~upto~up mapawpaw i ɾənɾən, nikawrira ʦaaj pakatama to~u ħakaɾ, ʦaaj pakatama to~u ɾo~umaʡ, matataŋiʦ a tato~usa. taɾifaħaɾ sa ira ko~u ʡarikak, o~uni taʡian nira masatapo~uro~uaj masaɬ~ɮak i rijar, o~u nian ko~uja iko~uraj a ʦiɾaŋasan. mataʡəɾif ko~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ, mato~uʡas to~u ʦaŋra tato~usa, ʦaaj pakatama to~u ro~uma maɾo~uramo~uɬ~ɮ, nano~ujaan o~u nia maɾikakaaj raramo~uɬ~ɮ sato~u ʦaŋra. saʡajaw o~u niso~ufo~uʦan naŋra tato~usa o~u kaɾiŋsəsan pinaʡo~urip, tinako~u o~u kaŋiʦ, tatakaaj, fafiro~u~uŋ, ħaro~ukaj. tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sa pasiɾaəno~u ko~u nəŋnəŋ no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ kawas, mio~uʦo~ur to~u saka faɾo~u a wawa a kawas ʦi tatako~u~usan a minəŋnəŋ, taɾifaħaɾ sa pakanəŋnəŋ ʦaŋra tato~usa to~u nai kakarajan kawas maɾo~ukəɾo~un, nawħani mətaɾaw sapiɾaɾiwan a mitəfo~uʦ, fo~uʡo~utan no~u kawas a miɾiʦɾiʦ to~u kamatira no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. itija mafanaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮəmakan, so~uŋiɾaʡ ħan to~u ni tatako~u~usan pasifanaʡ ko~u ina no~u kawas, sasiniʡaɬ~ɮa sa ko~u ʦɬ~ɮaɾ, o~uʦo~urən ħo~u ko~u wawa kawas maɾikəɾo~un miħino~um tina maɾikakaaj, miħajɬ~ɮa mio~uʦo~ur to~u miɬ~ɮipo~utaj kawas a maɾikəɾo~un. sano~ujaan ʦi saɾaɾaʦaɾ ato~u sao~urijan a kawas miħawikiɬ~ɮ to~u ʦəʦaj ao~uɾ tajni ħəkaɾ pasifanaʡ samaanən ko~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮiʡi i naiko~uran a mafaɬ~ɮo~uʦaj no~u ɾənɾən a maɾikakaaj, itija maŋaʡaj ko~u kaʦiwawa. pasifanaʡ ħan to~u ni tatako~u~usan: "nawħani o~u maɾikakaaj kamo~u tato~usa, ʦaaj kaŋaʡaj mararamo~uɬ~ɮ, o~urasaka kəɾo~uŋən ko~u sikaɾ, paɾaəɬ~ɮ tamo~unan tato~usa, ħaənən ta maŋaʡaj maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮiʡi ko~u kaʦiwawa namo~u." nano~ujaan iko~ur ʦiwawa ʦaŋra maɾikaka to~u to~uɾo~uaj wawa to~u fafaħija ato~u ʦəʦaj fainajan, o~u nian ko~u tato~uʡasan no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw. no~u kawas a rajraj.
S.FORM: == Kawakawasan ratoh no 'Amis/Pangcah == "Milikatay wawa to fafahiya"-Tiyamacan ato "Wawa no riyar kawas" -Felalakac.("發光的女孩"Tiyamacan與"海神之子"Felalakac) Ci Tiyamacan, o cecay fafahiya kawas no 'Amis/Pangcah, nawhani o makapahay fafahiyan kaolahen no wawa no riyar ci Falalakac nicefisan malafafahi, orasaka mala o tato'asan to no laloma'an no 'Amis/Pangcah. Ci Tiyamacan o sasafaay wawa to fafahiyan no tasaay kawas ci Madapidap ato ci Keseng. Matira ko soal o samakapahay nengnengen cingra, nikaitiyad ho no ina caay ho kahofaoc i malikat ci'edil saan, citiyad ho ci Madapidap malikat ko 'edil, ikor no kahofoc malokaolahan no laloma'an kaomi'en. Kawakawasan ratoh no 'Amis/Pangcah. Ira ko cecay romi'ad, tayra i 'alo ci Tiyamacan miradom i, manengneng no wawa no riyar kawas ci Felalakac, kaimahen ni Felalakac kokakapah ningra, nanoya ngitangicen ni Felalakac a malafafahi, o laloma'an ni Tiyamac caay ka sakaala ni Felalakac, tafone to papah no kilang a misimed, palimeken to i laloma' kongkong no kilang ano eca i tatahengan misimed, nikawrira nika milikatay matedi ko tireng ni Tiyamacan mahapineng manengneng, marketer to ci Felalakac pacefcef han to ningra ko riyar i hekal, masanga' to ko lenlen maalol tayra i riyar ci Tiyamacan, itiya patanic han malafafahi. Mapawpaw ci Tiyamacan i riyar, o mama ato ina ningra itira i salawacan no riyar mikotod pasariyar tangasa i kawali ka'amis no Takidis, mafana' o caacaay to pakaliyas ci Felalakasan sato, itiya laliyas sato mama ato ina, nanoya ci Madapidap ato ci Keseng o ka'ilolan to wawa ci Tiyamacan, mala o Dakidakit ato Arongay misimaw i salawacan no riyar. Katengilan no sowal, mapaci'eci kalofafahien ci Tiyamacan i, makakeleng ko kakarayan, o todong pitifekan ningra to felac; ano ci langod ko riyar i, o pifalahan ningra to 'asad ato afih, oy ana 'asad ato afih malapodaw, o kadademakan no kidacay foting i riyar, o todong piwangawang ningra to kamay. "Milikatay wawa to fafahiya"- no satapangan to'asan Kawakawasan ratoh no 'Amis/Pangcah. Iti:ya ho, ina no kawas ci Madapidap ato mama no kawas ci Keseng a tasaay fa'elohay kawas, malikelon cangra itira 'akawangay katimolay kitakit a Arapanapanayan lotok, misofoc to fainayan kawas ci Ladi'afo, Dadakiyolo, Apotok, Lalakan, fafahiyan kawas ci Doc, Tiyamacan a 'enem wawa a kawas. Nikawrira ya cipoyapoy ko ina a kawas ci Tiyamacan i, ira ko malikatay i tiyad, mahapinang manengneng ko laloma'ay, masofoc mahapinang o makapahay nengnengen o fafahiya wawa a kawas. Ira ko cecay romi'ad, o safa fafahiyan masadak a miladom, i fatad no lalan malitemoh ko wawa no riyar kawas ci Felalakacan, nanoya maolah patangic a malofafahien, nanoya paro no loma' misakimokimor misimed milaliw. Nikawrira manengneng caay pakasimed, marketer a palalenlen to sapicefis to sasafaay a safa to fafahiyan milaliw. O ka'ilol no ina ci Madapidap to sasafaay wawa to fafahiyan, mala molengaway i tonotono'an a Dakidakit, o mama ci Keseng mala Arongay misimaw to salawacan no riyar; o sakakaay ci Tadi'Afo milimek tayra i lotok, ikor mala tato'asan no Atayal finacadan; saka tosa a kaka ci Dadakiyolo milaliw pasi'etip mala o tato'asan no 'etipay yincumin; saka tolo a wawa ci Apotok milaliw pasitimol mala tato'asan no Iwatan(Ponon) finacadan; saka sepat a safa ci Lalakan ato saka lima safa to fafahiyan ci Doci i ta'akay riyar, midakaw to toptop mapawpaw i lenlen, nikawrira caay pakatama to hakal, caay pakatama to loma', matatangic a tatosa. Talifahal sa ira ko 'arikak, oni ta'ian nira masataporoay masadak i riyar, o nian koya ikoray a Cilangasan. Mata'elif ko romi'ami'ad, mato'as to cangra tatosa, caay pakatama to roma maloramod, nanoyaan o nia malikakaay raramod sato cangra. Sa'ayaw o nisofocan nangra tatosa o kalingsesan pina'orip, tinako o Kangic, Tatakaay, Fafirung, Harokay. Tatodong sa pasilaeno ko nengneng no Cidal kawas, miocor to saka falo a wawa a kawas ci Tatakusan a minengneng, talifahal sa pakanengneng cangra tatosa to nai kakarayan kawas malokelon, nawhani metalaw sapilaliwan a mitefoc, fo'otan no kawas a miliclic to kamatira no demak. Itiya mafana' to demakan, songila' han to ni Tatakusan pasifana' ko ina no kawas, sasini'ada sa ko Cdal, ocoren ho ko wawa kawas malikelon mihinom tina malikakaay, mihayda miocor to midipotay kawas a malikelon. Sanoyaan ci Salalacal ato Saoriyan a kawas mihawikid to cecay aol tayni hekal pasifana' samaanen ko kadadi'i i naikoran a mafadocay no lenlen a malikakaay, itiya manga'ay ko kaciwawa. Pasifana' han to ni Tatakusan: "Nawhani o malikakaay kamo tatosa, caay kanga'ay mararamod, orasaka kelongen ko sikal, palaed tamonan tatosa, haenen ta manga'ay madadi'i ko kaciwawa namo." Nanoyaan ikor ciwawa cangra malikaka to toloay wawa to fafahiya ato cecay fainayan, o nian ko tato'asan no tamdamdaw. No kawas a rayray.
S.PHON: == kawakawasan rato~uħ no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ == "miɾikataj wawa to~u fafaħija"-tijamaʦan ato~u "wawa no~u rijar kawas" -fəɾaɾakaʦ.("*****"tijamaʦan*"****"fəɾaɾakaʦ) ʦi tijamaʦan, o~u ʦəʦaj fafaħija kawas no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ, nawħani o~u makapaħaj fafaħijan kao~uɾaħən no~u wawa no~u rijar ʦi faɾaɾakaʦ niʦəfisan maɾafafaħi, o~urasaka maɾa o~u tato~uʡasan to~u no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ. ʦi tijamaʦan o~u sasafaaj wawa to~u fafaħijan no~u tasaaj kawas ʦi maɬ~ɮapiɬ~ɮap ato~u ʦi kəsəŋ. matira ko~u so~uaɾ o~u samakapaħaj nəŋnəŋən ʦiŋra, nikaitijaɬ~ɮ ħo~u no~u ina ʦaaj ħo~u kaħo~ufao~uʦ i maɾikat ʦiʡəɬ~ɮiɾ saan, ʦitijaɬ~ɮ ħo~u ʦi maɬ~ɮapiɬ~ɮap maɾikat ko~u ʡəɬ~ɮiɾ, iko~ur no~u kaħo~ufo~uʦ maɾo~ukao~uɾaħan no~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan kao~umiʡən. kawakawasan rato~uħ no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ. ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tajra i ʡaɾo~u ʦi tijamaʦan miraɬ~ɮo~um i, manəŋnəŋ no~u wawa no~u rijar kawas ʦi fəɾaɾakaʦ, kaimaħən ni fəɾaɾakaʦ ko~ukakapaħ niŋra, nano~uja ŋitaŋiʦən ni fəɾaɾakaʦ a maɾafafaħi, o~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan ni tijamaʦ ʦaaj ka sakaaɾa ni fəɾaɾakaʦ, tafo~unə to~u papaħ no~u kiɾaŋ a misiməɬ~ɮ, paɾiməkən to~u i ɾaɾo~umaʡ ko~uŋko~uŋ no~u kiɾaŋ ano~u əʦa i tataħəŋan misiməɬ~ɮ, nikawrira nika miɾikataj matəɬ~ɮi ko~u tirəŋ ni tijamaʦan maħapinəŋ manəŋnəŋ, markətər to~u ʦi fəɾaɾakaʦ paʦəfʦəf ħan to~u niŋra ko~u rijar i ħəkaɾ, masaŋaʡ to~u ko~u ɾənɾən maaɾo~uɾ tajra i rijar ʦi tijamaʦan, itija pataniʦ ħan maɾafafaħi. mapawpaw ʦi tijamaʦan i rijar, o~u mama ato~u ina niŋra itira i saɾawaʦan no~u rijar miko~uto~uɬ~ɮ pasarijar taŋasa i kawaɾi kaʡamis no~u takiɬ~ɮis, mafanaʡ o~u ʦaaʦaaj to~u pakaɾijas ʦi fəɾaɾakasan sato~u, itija ɾaɾijas sato~u mama ato~u ina, nano~uja ʦi maɬ~ɮapiɬ~ɮap ato~u ʦi kəsəŋ o~u kaʡiɾo~uɾan to~u wawa ʦi tijamaʦan, maɾa o~u ɬ~ɮakiɬ~ɮakit ato~u aro~uŋaj misimaw i saɾawaʦan no~u rijar. katəŋiɾan no~u so~uwaɾ, mapaʦiʡəʦi kaɾo~ufafaħiən ʦi tijamaʦan i, makakəɾəŋ ko~u kakarajan, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ pitifəkan niŋra to~u fəɾaʦ; ano~u ʦi ɾaŋo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u rijar i, o~u pifaɾaħan niŋra to~u ʡasaɬ~ɮ ato~u afiħ, o~uj ana ʡasaɬ~ɮ ato~u afiħ maɾapo~uɬ~ɮaw, o~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan no~u kiɬ~ɮaʦaj fo~utiŋ i rijar, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ piwaŋawaŋ niŋra to~u kamaj. "miɾikataj wawa to~u fafaħija"- no~u satapaŋan to~uʡasan kawakawasan rato~uħ no~u ʡamis/paŋʦaħ. iti:ja ħo~u, ina no~u kawas ʦi maɬ~ɮapiɬ~ɮap ato~u mama no~u kawas ʦi kəsəŋ a tasaaj faʡəɾo~uħaj kawas, maɾikəɾo~un ʦaŋra itira ʡakawaŋaj katimo~uɾaj kitakit a arapanapanajan ɾo~uto~uk, miso~ufo~uʦ to~u fainajan kawas ʦi ɾaɬ~ɮiʡafo~u, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮakijo~uɾo~u, apo~uto~uk, ɾaɾakan, fafaħijan kawas ʦi ɬ~ɮo~uʦ, tijamaʦan a ʡənəm wawa a kawas. nikawrira ja ʦipo~ujapo~uj ko~u ina a kawas ʦi tijamaʦan i, ira ko~u maɾikataj i tijaɬ~ɮ, maħapinaŋ manəŋnəŋ ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡaj, maso~ufo~uʦ maħapinaŋ o~u makapaħaj nəŋnəŋən o~u fafaħija wawa a kawas. ira ko~u ʦəʦaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u safa fafaħijan masaɬ~ɮak a miɾaɬ~ɮo~um, i fataɬ~ɮ no~u ɾaɾan maɾitəmo~uħ ko~u wawa no~u rijar kawas ʦi fəɾaɾakaʦan, nano~uja mao~uɾaħ pataŋiʦ a maɾo~ufafaħiən, nano~uja paro~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ misakimo~ukimo~ur misiməɬ~ɮ miɾaɾiw. nikawrira manəŋnəŋ ʦaaj pakasiməɬ~ɮ, markətər a paɾaɾənɾən to~u sapiʦəfis to~u sasafaaj a safa to~u fafaħijan miɾaɾiw. o~u kaʡiɾo~uɾ no~u ina ʦi maɬ~ɮapiɬ~ɮap to~u sasafaaj wawa to~u fafaħijan, maɾa mo~uɾəŋawaj i to~uno~uto~uno~uʡan a ɬ~ɮakiɬ~ɮakit, o~u mama ʦi kəsəŋ maɾa aro~uŋaj misimaw to~u saɾawaʦan no~u rijar; o~u sakakaaj ʦi taɬ~ɮiʡafo~u miɾimək tajra i ɾo~uto~uk, iko~ur maɾa tato~uʡasan no~u atajaɾ finaʦaɬ~ɮan; saka to~usa a kaka ʦi ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮakijo~uɾo~u miɾaɾiw pasiʡətip maɾa o~u tato~uʡasan no~u ʡətipaj jinʦo~u~umin; saka to~uɾo~u a wawa ʦi apo~uto~uk miɾaɾiw pasitimo~uɾ maɾa tato~uʡasan no~u iwatan(po~uno~un) finaʦaɬ~ɮan; saka səpat a safa ʦi ɾaɾakan ato~u saka ɾima safa to~u fafaħijan ʦi ɬ~ɮo~uʦi i taʡakaj rijar, miɬ~ɮakaw to~u to~upto~up mapawpaw i ɾənɾən, nikawrira ʦaaj pakatama to~u ħakaɾ, ʦaaj pakatama to~u ɾo~umaʡ, matataŋiʦ a tato~usa. taɾifaħaɾ sa ira ko~u ʡarikak, o~uni taʡian nira masatapo~uro~uaj masaɬ~ɮak i rijar, o~u nian ko~uja iko~uraj a ʦiɾaŋasan. mataʡəɾif ko~u ro~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ, mato~uʡas to~u ʦaŋra tato~usa, ʦaaj pakatama to~u ro~uma maɾo~uramo~uɬ~ɮ, nano~ujaan o~u nia maɾikakaaj raramo~uɬ~ɮ sato~u ʦaŋra. saʡajaw o~u niso~ufo~uʦan naŋra tato~usa o~u kaɾiŋsəsan pinaʡo~urip, tinako~u o~u kaŋiʦ, tatakaaj, fafiro~u~uŋ, ħaro~ukaj. tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sa pasiɾaəno~u ko~u nəŋnəŋ no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ kawas, mio~uʦo~ur to~u saka faɾo~u a wawa a kawas ʦi tatako~u~usan a minəŋnəŋ, taɾifaħaɾ sa pakanəŋnəŋ ʦaŋra tato~usa to~u nai kakarajan kawas maɾo~ukəɾo~un, nawħani mətaɾaw sapiɾaɾiwan a mitəfo~uʦ, fo~uʡo~utan no~u kawas a miɾiʦɾiʦ to~u kamatira no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. itija mafanaʡ to~u ɬ~ɮəmakan, so~uŋiɾaʡ ħan to~u ni tatako~u~usan pasifanaʡ ko~u ina no~u kawas, sasiniʡaɬ~ɮa sa ko~u ʦɬ~ɮaɾ, o~uʦo~urən ħo~u ko~u wawa kawas maɾikəɾo~un miħino~um tina maɾikakaaj, miħajɬ~ɮa mio~uʦo~ur to~u miɬ~ɮipo~utaj kawas a maɾikəɾo~un. sano~ujaan ʦi saɾaɾaʦaɾ ato~u sao~urijan a kawas miħawikiɬ~ɮ to~u ʦəʦaj ao~uɾ tajni ħəkaɾ pasifanaʡ samaanən ko~u kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮiʡi i naiko~uran a mafaɬ~ɮo~uʦaj no~u ɾənɾən a maɾikakaaj, itija maŋaʡaj ko~u kaʦiwawa. pasifanaʡ ħan to~u ni tatako~u~usan: "nawħani o~u maɾikakaaj kamo~u tato~usa, ʦaaj kaŋaʡaj mararamo~uɬ~ɮ, o~urasaka kəɾo~uŋən ko~u sikaɾ, paɾaəɬ~ɮ tamo~unan tato~usa, ħaənən ta maŋaʡaj maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮiʡi ko~u kaʦiwawa namo~u." nano~ujaan iko~ur ʦiwawa ʦaŋra maɾikaka to~u to~uɾo~uaj wawa to~u fafaħija ato~u ʦəʦaj fainajan, o~u nian ko~u tato~uʡasan no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw. no~u kawas a rajraj.
